news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance MD dismisses affordable housing slowdown, projects 20% growth over 2-3 years.
Company focuses on self-construction, resale housing; FY26 disbursements up 15% YoY at Rs 6,469 crore.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance MD dismisses affordable housing slowdown, projects 20% growth over 2-3 years.
Company focuses on self-construction, resale housing; FY26 disbursements up 15% YoY at Rs 6,469 crore.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces reclassification of promoters to public category after an open offer.
BCP Asia II Holdco VII Pte. Ltd. acquires control, holding 65.1% equity shares post transaction.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces reclassification of promoters to public category after an open offer.
BCP Asia II Holdco VII Pte. Ltd. acquires control, holding 65.1% equity shares post transaction.

news.title:
Acquirer bought 28.2 Cr shares of Aadhar Housing at ₹425/share, now holding 28.28 Cr shares.
Promoter group exits control; another entity acquired 4.41 Cr shares as public shareholder.
news.summary:
Acquirer bought 28.2 Cr shares of Aadhar Housing at ₹425/share, now holding 28.28 Cr shares.
Promoter group exits control; another entity acquired 4.41 Cr shares as public shareholder.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces post-open offer updates per SEBI SAST Regulations.
Acquirer BCP Asia, with PACs, acquired 0.17% shares; offer size was ₹34.8 crore.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces post-open offer updates per SEBI SAST Regulations.
Acquirer BCP Asia, with PACs, acquired 0.17% shares; offer size was ₹34.8 crore.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance's open offer sees 0.65% of shares tendered so far.
Tendered shares await validation; JM Financial manages the open offer.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance's open offer sees 0.65% of shares tendered so far.
Tendered shares await validation; JM Financial manages the open offer.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces participation in Non-Deal Roadshow hosted by Citigroup, Mumbai from 16-17 Feb 2026.
Investor presentation uploaded on 30 Jan 2026 may be used during meetings; dates subject to change.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces participation in Non-Deal Roadshow hosted by Citigroup, Mumbai from 16-17 Feb 2026.
Investor presentation uploaded on 30 Jan 2026 may be used during meetings; dates subject to change.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance open offer by BCP Asia II Holdco VII Pte. Ltd. sees 0 shares tendered as of 9 Feb 2026.
Tendered shares are subject to verification; accepted shares might differ from tendered.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance open offer by BCP Asia II Holdco VII Pte. Ltd. sees 0 shares tendered as of 9 Feb 2026.
Tendered shares are subject to verification; accepted shares might differ from tendered.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd's open offer saw 0 shares tendered on 2 Feb 2026.
Tendered shares are under verification; final accepted shares may vary.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd's open offer saw 0 shares tendered on 2 Feb 2026.
Tendered shares are under verification; final accepted shares may vary.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance's AUM grew 20% YoY to ₹28,790 Cr by Dec '25.
Profit after tax rose 20% YoY to ₹797 Cr in 9M FY26; net worth up 18%.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance's AUM grew 20% YoY to ₹28,790 Cr by Dec '25.
Profit after tax rose 20% YoY to ₹797 Cr in 9M FY26; net worth up 18%.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd receives an open offer from BCP Asia II Holdco VII Pte. Ltd. and others to acquire 11.35 crore shares at ₹469.97/share.
The offer represents 25.82% of expanded voting share capital and adheres to SEBI regulations. Payment delays incur 10% annual interest.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd receives an open offer from BCP Asia II Holdco VII Pte. Ltd. and others to acquire 11.35 crore shares at ₹469.97/share.
The offer represents 25.82% of expanded voting share capital and adheres to SEBI regulations. Payment delays incur 10% annual interest.

news.title:
RBI approves transactions for equity share acquisition in Aadhar Housing Finance.
Open offer triggered per SEBI rules; acquirer to purchase over 28 crore shares.
news.summary:
RBI approves transactions for equity share acquisition in Aadhar Housing Finance.
Open offer triggered per SEBI rules; acquirer to purchase over 28 crore shares.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announced changes in senior management designations under SEBI LODR.
Shrikant Patil (Head-Technical) and Suraj Shetty (Head-Legal) ceased as SMPs but remain employees.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announced changes in senior management designations under SEBI LODR.
Shrikant Patil (Head-Technical) and Suraj Shetty (Head-Legal) ceased as SMPs but remain employees.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd confirmed timely payment of Rs. 6.99 lakh interest on NCDs, post TDS deduction.
The payment was made on the due date, January 1, 2026, with no delays reported.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd confirmed timely payment of Rs. 6.99 lakh interest on NCDs, post TDS deduction.
The payment was made on the due date, January 1, 2026, with no delays reported.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance expects 20-22% AUM growth for FY26, outperforming H1.
Rate cuts will be passed by Q3-end; company is well-capitalized for 2.5-3 years.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance expects 20-22% AUM growth for FY26, outperforming H1.
Rate cuts will be passed by Q3-end; company is well-capitalized for 2.5-3 years.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces an investor meeting on 4th Dec 2025 at Trident BKC, Mumbai.
The event will use publicly available documents, with details subject to change due to exigencies.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd announces an investor meeting on 4th Dec 2025 at Trident BKC, Mumbai.
The event will use publicly available documents, with details subject to change due to exigencies.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd's credit rating for NCDs of Rs. 50 crore withdrawn after full redemption.
Brickwork Ratings confirmed redemption and withdrawal request; no rated instruments remain for Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd's credit rating for NCDs of Rs. 50 crore withdrawn after full redemption.
Brickwork Ratings confirmed redemption and withdrawal request; no rated instruments remain for Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd.

news.title:
CCI approves Blackstone's acquisition of 80.15% stake in Aadhar Housing Finance.
Approval highlights favorable regulatory climate for housing finance investments.
news.summary:
CCI approves Blackstone's acquisition of 80.15% stake in Aadhar Housing Finance.
Approval highlights favorable regulatory climate for housing finance investments.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd reports strong growth, with AUM up 21% YoY to INR 276bn and PAT rising 18% to INR 5bn in H1 FY26.
The firm focuses on low-income housing, operates 611 branches across India, and maintains stable asset quality with a GNPA of 1.4%.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd reports strong growth, with AUM up 21% YoY to INR 276bn and PAT rising 18% to INR 5bn in H1 FY26.
The firm focuses on low-income housing, operates 611 branches across India, and maintains stable asset quality with a GNPA of 1.4%.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance reappoints CRO Nirav Shah for 3 years from Jan 2026.
Nirav Shah, with 20 years' experience, has led key risk management initiatives.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance reappoints CRO Nirav Shah for 3 years from Jan 2026.
Nirav Shah, with 20 years' experience, has led key risk management initiatives.

news.title:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd schedules Q2FY26 earnings call on Nov 7, 2025, at 6 PM IST.
Call details include virtual format, senior management participation, and global access via toll-free numbers.
news.summary:
Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd schedules Q2FY26 earnings call on Nov 7, 2025, at 6 PM IST.
Call details include virtual format, senior management participation, and global access via toll-free numbers.
